title: Secret Temple
description: In this map, you enter the ruins of the Jungle Temple and try to survive the challenging stages within. The map is multiplayer-friendly and can also be played solo. It includes parkour, a labyrinth, a mob arena, archery, and a surprise stage.
body:
# Secret Temple

**Are you ready to uncover the hidden secrets buried deep within the Jungle Temple?**

Far from civilization, deep in the heart of the jungle, lies an ancient structure wrapped in mystery and danger. Legends say that those who enter the temple rarely return—but those who do, never come back the same.

You can take on this challenge alone or with friends, but be warned: teamwork might save you… or doom you. Inside these crumbling ruins, every corner hides a new test of skill and courage.

The temple includes:

- Parkour trials that push your reflexes to the limit.
- A twisting labyrinth where one wrong turn could trap you forever.
- A fierce mob arena that will test your combat instincts.
- Archery challenges demanding precision and timing.
- And finally, a secret stage—a surprise that only the bravest will reach.

Every stone, every torch, every shadow tells a story of those who failed before you. Will you solve the mysteries of the temple and claim its hidden rewards, or become another lost explorer swallowed by the jungle?
